This file is generated from `policy/contributing_rules.toml`. Edit the policy file, not the rendered Markdown.

# PR Evidence Template

Fill every section with concrete evidence or an explicit rationale. Do not leave placeholders.
The PR evidence check reads these headings directly.

## Why

- Fill this section with concise, concrete information.

## Risk

- Fill this section with concise, concrete information.

## Test Plan

- Fill this section with concise, concrete information.

## Performance Impact

- Fill this section with concise, concrete information.

## Subsystems

- Fill this section with concise, concrete information.

## Verification

- Commands run and the scope they covered.
- Any targeted tests or semantic smoke you relied on.

## Benchmark Evidence

- If performance-sensitive paths changed, include command, workload, and baseline vs changed result.
- If not performance-sensitive, state why.

## Dependency Impact

- List any dependency changes and whether approval was needed.
- Call out portability, determinism, or build-time impact.

## Exceptions

- List any deliberate rule exceptions and why they are justified.
- If none, say so explicitly.
